description_long: This is a horizontally oriented, slightly curved banner with the word 'RIVALRY' prominently displayed in bold, uppercase letters. The banner has a thick, dark border that frames the lighter central area where the text is located, creating a strong visual contrast. The text appears to be three-dimensional, with a shadowed effect that gives it depth and prominence. The overall shape of the banner is rectangular with outward-flaring ends, giving it a dynamic and attention-grabbing appearance. The surface looks smooth and rigid, likely made from a durable material suitable for outdoor use. There are no visible mounting elements or support structures attached to the banner.
description: A bold, curved banner with 'RIVALRY' in large, three-dimensional letters, framed by a thick dark border and a lighter central area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'RIVALRY' text in bold, three-dimensional letters with a dark border and light background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner, with minimal visible detail except for its slight curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid dark back of the banner, with no visible text or design elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin, slightly curved profile of the banner.
